message:
fix(doctor): pass configured db name to remaining dolt.New() call sites

Follow-up to #1929 — applies doltDatabaseName(beadsDir) to the 3 call
sites in validation.go, maintenance.go, and migration_validation.go that
were still using the hardcoded default. Supersedes #1932.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -230,7 +230,7 @@ func CheckMigrationCompletion(path string) (DoctorCheck, MigrationValidationResu
 	// Check Dolt database health
 	ctx := context.Background()
 	doltPath := filepath.Join(beadsDir, "dolt")
-	store, err := dolt.New(ctx, &dolt.Config{Path: doltPath, ReadOnly: true})
+	store, err := dolt.New(ctx, &dolt.Config{Path: doltPath, ReadOnly: true, Database: doltDatabaseName(beadsDir)})
 	if err != nil {
 		result.Ready = false
 		result.DoltHealthy = false
